channel.title: The CastAmplify Show
channel.description: One practical podcasting lesson a week, from someone building from zero — for everyone building from zero. Hosted by Tendayi Chengeta, pig farmer in Zimbabwe and founder of CastAmplify, the global creator infrastructure company.
channel.itunes:author: Tendayi Chengeta

item.title: Episode 1 — Starting From Zero
item.description: Virgin land. No pens, no pigs, nothing — and what that teaches you about starting a podcast. Tendayi shares the real story of building his farm from bare ground, the honest struggles of a Zimbabwean winter, and the one lesson that applies to farms and podcasts alike: plant with the rain you have. Plus: what we built at CastAmplify this week. Try the free feed migration demo at castamplify.com.
